title: Lightweight Cost Savings Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for evaluating cost savings from lightweighting initiatives in logistics and manufacturing, aligned with Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Current Weight per Unit (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the product or packaging before lightweighting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the product or packaging before lightweighting.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hafifletme öncesi ürün veya ambalaj ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des Produkts oder der Verpackung vor der Gewichtsreduzierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids du produit ou de l'emballage avant allègement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso del producto o embalaje antes de la reducción de peso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن المنتج أو العبوة قبل تخفيف الوزن.

inputs.label: New Weight per Unit (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the product or packaging after lightweighting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the product or packaging after lightweighting.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hafifletme sonrası ürün veya ambalaj ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des Produkts oder der Verpackung nach der Gewichtsreduzierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids du produit ou de l'emballage après allègement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso del producto o embalaje después de la reducción de peso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن المنتج أو العبوة بعد تخفيف الوزن.

inputs.label: Annual Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced or shipped per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced or shipped per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda üretilen veya sevk edilen toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der pro Jahr produzierten oder versendeten Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites ou expédiées par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades producidas o enviadas por año.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الوحدات المنتجة أو المشحونة سنويًا.

inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw material per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of raw material per kilogram.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de la matière première par kilogramme.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de la materia prima por kilogramo.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de fret moyen par kilogramme.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste medio de flete por kilogramo.

inputs.label: Waste Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material wasted during production (scrap, rework).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of material wasted during production (scrap, rework).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim sırasında israf edilen malzeme yüzdesi (fire, yeniden işleme).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des während der Produktion verschwendeten Materials (Ausschuss, Nacharbeit).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matière gaspillée pendant la production (rebut, reprise).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de material desperdiciado durante la producción (desperdicio, retrabajo).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة المواد المهدرة أثناء الإنتاج (خردة، إعادة عمل).

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor hours required to produce one unit.

label_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra por unidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor hours required to produce one unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir birim üretmek için gereken doğrudan işçilik saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Arbeitsstunden, die zur Herstellung einer Einheit erforderlich sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de travail direct nécessaires pour produire une unité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra directa requeridas para producir una unidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ساعات العمل المباشرة المطلوبة لإنتاج وحدة واحدة.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire incluant les avantages sociaux.

rules.message: New weight must be less than current weight to achieve savings.
Annual volume must be greater than zero.
Waste rate must be between 0% and 100%.

thresholds.message: Annual savings are low; consider larger volume or greater weight reduction.
Significant annual savings achieved; recommend further optimization.
Payback period exceeds 3 years; evaluate investment risk.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
